$comment: Single source of truth for /validate + /enrich timeout coordination across proxy (worker_client.js) and worker (worker.py). The client_ms must EXCEED worker_deferred_sec*1000 so the proxy can receive the worker's graceful 'engine under load' deferred response instead of timing out client-side and triggering BrokenPipe in the worker. See tools/HME/proxy/worker_client.js + tools/HME/service/worker.py.
